title: Lebanon: Conflict Intensity, 2 March – 25 March 2026
text: Published by OCHA, this snapshot report maps conflict intensity and displacement orders across Lebanon for the period 2-25 March 2026. Active hostilities continue in multiple areas, particularly in the south. Evacuation orders have expanded geographically, and significant population displacement is ongoing. Access to some areas remains severely restricted, constraining humanitarian operations. The report underscores the urgency of establishing deconfliction mechanisms to enable delivery of life-saving aid.
